findings.summary: error early-return wipes last-good data on transient blip — single poll fail loses full UI for a retry cycle
findings.resolution_note: Change to banner overlay over last-good data;keep MarketHeader/Heatmap/Leaderboard mounted when error AND data exist.

findings.summary: _max_tick_date strips Z then parses as naive → re-stamp TPE → 8h skew if upstream emits UTC
findings.resolution_note: If trailing Z detected,parse as UTC then astimezone(TPE_TZ);real probe never showed Z but defensive correctness required (CLAUDE.md §9 Lessons).

findings.summary: stale=True triggered by any of 3 fetches failing — daily-cache miss spuriously flags intraday banner
findings.resolution_note: Set stale=True only when universe fetch failed (true intraday staleness signal);log daily fetch failures but don't taint payload flag.

findings.summary: _fetch_sector_map / _fetch_market_value_map 忽略 refresh flag — CLAUDE.md §4 contract half-honored
findings.resolution_note: Wire refresh=True through both daily fetchers,bypass cache when explicitly asked.

findings.summary: httpx exception catch in route is dead code — service swallows via gather(return_exceptions=True)
findings.resolution_note: Remove the dead httpx tuple catch (rely on service-level + global ValueError handler);drop the misleading test or refactor it to mock at HTTP layer.

findings.summary: Global httpx handler emits `finmind_error` but market route emits `finmind_unreachable` for same failure class
findings.resolution_note: Reject:main.py:65 global handler 是給其他 route(chip/options 已用 finmind_error)。改 main.py code 會 break 其他 endpoint 的既有契約;改 market 用 finmind_error 又少了 unreachable 語意。風險>收益,保留現狀並加 comment 說明差異。Phase 8.5 沉澱:雙 error code 慣例可後續統一(獨立 refactor PR)。

findings.summary: Lag pill 顯示 `1080 分鐘` 而非「已收盤」label 在 !isTradingSession 時
findings.resolution_note: !isTradingSession 時隱藏 lag pill(改顯示 '已收盤'/' 假日 ' label 即足)。

findings.summary: forceRefreshRef race with concurrent polling — user click consumed by in-flight poll,refresh 一個 tick 後才生效
findings.resolution_note: refresh() 內先呼 queryClient.cancelQueries 取消 in-flight 再 refetch();成本低,徹底解 race。

findings.summary: docstring says '上週五' but 2026-06-28 is Sunday — misleading comment
findings.resolution_note: Fix docstring 'Sunday' or 改用真正的 Friday date(2026-06-26 13:30)+ 更新 literal 69600 → 67h+ 的對應值。

findings.summary: Codepoint ASC tie-breaker 可能挑出非直覺 industry(non-override 多 row stocks)
findings.resolution_note: 已 design.md §13 R-D5 同類 risk 標記;加 comment 明示 Phase 0b-2 probe 後可能擴 override table。

next_action: fix accepted findings via Phase 3 (test 紅 → impl 綠);R6 documented as known and skipped this round
